About Decon 3D

Our Vision

Decon 3D was founded with a single goal: to bridge the gap between 2D video conferencing and real-world collaboration. We believe that professional meetings should be as interactive and immersive as possible. Our platform allows engineers, architects, designers, and educators to share their work in a way that truly matters.
